item.title: Finishing Corn Harvest in 12 Days
item.description: Larson Farms works through corn harvest, focusing on steady field progress and getting the crop wrapped up efficiently.

media:content.media:title: Finishing Corn Harvest in 12 Days
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms works through corn harvest, focusing on steady field progress and getting the crop wrapped up efficiently.

item.title: Planting Season Is Here, Are We Ready?
item.description: Larson Farms gets ready for planting season with field work and equipment prep as spring conditions set the pace.

media:content.media:title: Planting Season Is Here, Are We Ready?
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms gets ready for planting season with field work and equipment prep as spring conditions set the pace.

item.title: Road Trip to Pick Up a New Spray Tender
item.description: Larson Farms heads out to pick up a new spray tender trailer, adding another useful piece of equipment for field work and seasonal spraying.

media:content.media:title: Road Trip to Pick Up a New Spray Tender
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms heads out to pick up a new spray tender trailer, adding another useful piece of equipment for field work and seasonal spraying.

item.title: Planting Season Is Here, Are We Ready?
item.description: Planting season is here, and the team is getting equipment and fields ready for the work ahead.

media:content.media:title: Planting Season Is Here, Are We Ready?
media:content.media:description: Planting season is here, and the team is getting equipment and fields ready for the work ahead.

item.title: Auction Day at Larson Farms
item.description: Larson Farms heads to auction to see what equipment they may bring home for the farm.

media:content.media:title: Auction Day at Larson Farms
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms heads to auction to see what equipment they may bring home for the farm.

item.title: Big Grain Cart Gets Stuck in the Field
item.description: Larson Farms works to free a huge grain cart after it gets stuck in the field, showing real farm equipment recovery and day-to-day harvest problem solving.

media:content.media:title: Big Grain Cart Gets Stuck in the Field
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms works to free a huge grain cart after it gets stuck in the field, showing real farm equipment recovery and day-to-day harvest problem solving.

item.title: Will This Track Finish Its Last Job?
item.description: Larson Farms puts a track to work on its last job and sees whether it can finish the task in the field.

media:content.media:title: Will This Track Finish Its Last Job?
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms puts a track to work on its last job and sees whether it can finish the task in the field.

item.title: Fixing Equipment During a Rain Delay
item.description: Larson Farms uses the rain delay to handle repairs and keep equipment ready for the next field day.

media:content.media:title: Fixing Equipment During a Rain Delay
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms uses the rain delay to handle repairs and keep equipment ready for the next field day.

item.title: Field Work Keeps Rolling at Larson Farms
item.description: Larson Farms keeps the work moving in the field, showing the steady pace of daily farm operations and equipment use.

media:content.media:title: Field Work Keeps Rolling at Larson Farms
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms keeps the work moving in the field, showing the steady pace of daily farm operations and equipment use.
